title: Leanest blueprint-only; only with named rollback doc
public_claim: Red Team Tranche I is a lean blueprint-only package for a reopen-fidelity analytical core.
distinctive_mechanism: It preserves source hierarchy, blockers, assumptions, session entries, rollback documentation, and the requirement that a user can leave the room, reopen it, and return to the same reasoning state.
use_value: It matters because the core software promise of Red Team Lab is durable reasoning continuity, not a one-time critique.
